overall.description: A cinematic exploration of a gothic castle courtyard in a video game, featuring a central fountain and approaching the main entrance of a historic stone cathedral. The camera moves steadily through the paved courtyard past manicured hedges and scattered NPCs, ending at an ornate wooden door flanked by stone gargoyles.

agents.ego_description: walking through the courtyard and circling around the central fountain to approach the main building

entered.detail: multi-tiered stone fountain with water lilies in the basin
tall gothic stone facade with arched windows and intricate carvings
manicured green hedges lining the courtyard pathways
stone seating arranged around the courtyard perimeter

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide gothic courtyard with a central fountain and towering cathedral facade. The camera moves forward and curves around the fountain, revealing stone benches and manicured hedges. An NPC sits on a bench to the right as the camera explores the open space.

scene_state.functional_zone: pathway leading to main cathedral entrance

events.description: turning from fountain area onto main pathway toward cathedral entrance

agents.ego_description: proceeding along the paved path toward the main entrance

entered.detail: large stone planters with blooming flowers flanking the pathway
massive carved wooden entrance door with metal studs

segments.scene_description: Moving past the fountain, the camera proceeds along a stone pathway toward the main cathedral entrance. Decorative planters with flowers line the path while the massive wooden door becomes visible in the distance. The fountain recedes to the left as the approach continues.

events.description: robed character walks across path from right to left
arriving at the large wooden entrance door

agents.ego_description: approaching the main entrance door and ascending the steps

notable_agents.action: student in dark academic robes walking across the entrance path from right to left

entered.detail: winged stone statues flanking the entrance staircase
carved stone arch surrounding the wooden door
medieval-style lanterns mounted on the stone walls beside the door

segments.scene_description: The final approach to the entrance shows the ornate wooden door growing larger in the frame. A robed character crosses the path from right to left. The camera passes between stone gargoyle statues flanking the staircase, ending with a close view of the detailed door carvings and archway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a wide gothic courtyard that gradually narrows into a focused approach toward a cathedral entrance. It begins by curving around a central fountain, revealing stone benches and manicured hedges where a lone NPC sits. As the fountain recedes to the left, the camera proceeds along a stone pathway lined with decorative flower planters, bringing the massive wooden door into clear view. The scene then shifts toward the final ascent as a robed character crosses the path, leading the camera between two stone gargoyle statues flanking the staircase. The movement finally culminates in a close-up of the detailed carvings and the imposing archway of the ornate wooden door.
